params.name: Mona Lisa
params.source:
* Fragment Crafting (18.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.68%)
* [[Kim Chi-yum]] - [[Rare Rent]]
params.description:
On Jul 20, AD 1503, Leonardo da Vinci completed the famous masterpiece of Mona Lisa. Leonardo da Vinci painted this portrait in Florence for over three years. With soft tones and delicate technique, he painted the lady's face, neck, and hands. It became a piece representative of the Renaissance. The most iconic feature of the painting is her enigmatic smile. [Basic Info] Type: Oil Painting
Collected by: Louvre Museum, France
Specifications: 77 cm in length, 53 cm in width
